title: Saudi Arabian Pine Nut Fritters
description: A crunchy and aromatic Indian-inspired sweet treat, made with pine nuts and a hint of saudi spices.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt.
Add pine nuts, sugar, and cardamom powder to the bowl, and mix until well combined.
Gradually add ghee or vegetable oil to the mixture, and mix until a dough forms.
Cover the dough and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Once the oil is hot, shape the dough into small balls and flatten them slightly.
Fry the fritters in batches until they are golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
